from pyspark.sql import functions as F

CASE_REF_FILE = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/Horizon_CaseReference.csv"

case_ref = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", True)
        .option("sep", "|")
        .option("multiLine", True)          
        .option("quote", '"')               # handle quoted fields
        .option("escape", '"')              # handle escaped quotes
        .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")       # don’t fail on bad rows
        .option("inferSchema", False)       # safer for messy exports
        .load(CASE_REF_FILE)
)

display(case_ref.limit(5))
print("case_ref rows:", case_ref.count())

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

PREFIXES = ["ROW/"]

prefix_filter = None
for p in PREFIXES:
    cond = F.col("CaseReference").startswith(p)
    prefix_filter = cond if prefix_filter is None else (prefix_filter | cond)

filtered_cases = (
    case_ref
    .filter(prefix_filter & F.col("CaseParentId").isNotNull())
    .select(
        F.col("CaseNodeId").cast("string").alias("caseNodeId"),
        F.col("CaseParentId").cast("string").alias("caseParentId")
    )
)

# rows where node = parent tell us the lead case
lead_cases = (
    filtered_cases
    .filter(F.col("caseNodeId") == F.col("caseParentId"))
    .select(F.col("caseNodeId").alias("leadCaseId"))
    .dropDuplicates()
)

# keep only actual child -> parent links
child_parent_links = (
    filtered_cases
    .filter(F.col("caseNodeId") != F.col("caseParentId"))
)

# child -> parent
# if the parent is a lead case, mark this link True
links_child_to_parent = (
    child_parent_links
    .join(
        lead_cases,
        child_parent_links["caseParentId"] == lead_cases["leadCaseId"],
        "left"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("caseNodeId").alias("caseId"),
        F.col("caseParentId").alias("linkedCaseId"),
        F.when(F.col("leadCaseId").isNotNull(), F.lit("True"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("False"))
         .alias("IsLead")
    )
)

# parent -> child
# reverse link should always be False because it points to a child
links_parent_to_child = (
    child_parent_links
    .select(
        F.col("caseParentId").alias("caseId"),
        F.col("caseNodeId").alias("linkedCaseId"),
        F.lit("False").alias("IsLead")
    )
)

linked_cases_final = (
    links_child_to_parent
    .unionByName(links_parent_to_child)
    .dropDuplicates()
    .orderBy("caseId", "linkedCaseId")
)

display(linked_cases_final)
print("linked cases final:", linked_cases_final.count())

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

CASE_REF_DIR = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/CaseRef"

case_ref_lookup = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(CASE_REF_DIR)
    .select(
        F.col("caseNodeId_str").cast("string").alias("caseNodeId"),
        F.col("caseReference").cast("string").alias("caseReference")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["caseNodeId"])
)

linked_cases_with_refs = (
    linked_cases_final.alias("lc")
    .join(
        case_ref_lookup.alias("lnk"),
        F.col("lc.linkedCaseId") == F.col("lnk.caseNodeId"),
        "left"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("lc.caseId"),
        F.col("lc.linkedCaseId"),
        F.col("lnk.caseReference").alias("linkedCaseReference"),
        F.col("lc.IsLead")
    )
    .orderBy("caseId", "linkedCaseId")
)

linked_cases_with_refs_clean = (
    linked_cases_with_refs
    .filter(
        F.col("linkedCaseReference").isNotNull() &
        (F.trim(F.col("linkedCaseReference")) != "")
    )
)

display(linked_cases_with_refs_clean)
print("linked cases (clean):", linked_cases_with_refs_clean.count())

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

CASES_CSV_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"

cases_lookup = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(CASES_CSV_PATH)
    .select(
        F.col("Case ID").cast("string").alias("caseId"),
        F.col("GUID").cast("string").alias("caseGuid")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["caseId"])
)

linked_cases_with_case_guid = (
    linked_cases_with_refs_clean.alias("lc")
    .join(
        cases_lookup.alias("c"),
        F.col("lc.caseId") == F.col("c.caseId"),
        "left"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("c.caseGuid").alias("id"),
        F.col("lc.caseId"),
        F.col("lc.linkedCaseId"),
        F.col("lc.linkedCaseReference"),
        F.col("lc.IsLead")
    )
)

display(linked_cases_with_case_guid)
print("linked cases with case guid:", linked_cases_with_case_guid.count())

from pyspark.sql import functions as F

# OUTPUT PATH
OUTPUT_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/LinkedCases"

# WRITE DF
(
    linked_cases_with_case_guid
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")  # overwrite each run (change to append if needed)
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(OUTPUT_PATH)
)

print("Written to:", OUTPUT_PATH)
print("Row count:", linked_cases_with_case_guid.count())
